name: Escort
description: Extract the VIP before enemy reinforcements seal the perimeter. Every moment counts, but rushing invites disaster.

victoryConditions.description: Attacker wins immediately if VIP survives inside Threshold until Turn 3/4/5

scoringRules.description: +1 VP immediately when VIP enters Threshold, +1 VP per Turn remaining inside
+2 VP to Defender for VIP Elimination

specialRules.name: Courier
specialRules.description: VIP entering Threshold awards +1 VP immediately and +1 VP per Turn remaining inside

specialRules.name: Catalyst (Reinforcements)
specialRules.description: At End of Turn 2/3/4, Defender rolls for reinforcements (4+ on 1d6). If VIP reaches Threshold before this, reinforcements are cancelled
